pool.baseline:
Hey, I'm looking at the audit from the Rotterdam DC for the Q3 electronic component stock. We've got some weird discrepancies between the WMS and the physical count. Can you look at this table and tell me if you see any patterns or possible reasons for the shrinkage?

| SKU | Description | WMS Count | Physical Count | Variance |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| XR-992 | Micro-controller Unit | 1,450 | 1,442 | -8 |
| XR-995 | Capacitors (10uF) | 12,000 | 11,985 | -15 |
| XR-102 | Voltage Regulators | 850 | 849 | -1 |
| XR-440 | Resistor Arrays | 5,000 | 4,992 | -8 |
| XR-003 | Logic Gates | 2,200 | 2,196 | -4 |

The variances are small but they keep happening every month. Any ideas?
